title: conyza reitziana
intro: Conyza reitziana, also known as Bushy Fleabane, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Conyza reitziana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments.
